caption:
They say knowledge is power, but tonight the power was definitely elsewhere. 😉👋 As a young professor at this prestigious university, I've always believed in dressing the part, even when the lectures run late into the night. Tonight, my Advanced Art History class spilled over into the private reading room, leaving just me and a handful of curious students to finish the discussion. I'm wearing my trusty cream silk blouse tucked into a high-waisted black pencil skirt that hugs every curve, paired with a tailored blazer that's slightly unbuttoned to hint at what's underneath. The room is dimly lit by a single overhead bulb, casting dramatic shadows across the bookshelves and highlighting the way the fabric of my blouse clings to my chest. 

As I walk to the front desk to grab the grading papers, the silence of the room suddenly breaks into a low hum of murmurs. One of the top students, a guy with a gaze that follows my every move, slides into his seat next to me, whispering, "Professor, can we just... stay for a bit longer?" I smile, adjusting my skirt slightly as the blazer slides off my shoulders to reveal the deep neckline I've spent all day styling for. "Of course," I purr, turning to face him, the scent of old books and vanilla perfume swirling around us. "But only if you promise to pay attention to the final chapter." 

#universityvibes #professorlife #campusstyle #latestudy #secretmeetings #fashionteacher #aesthetic
